allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a.get\('tool',{}\).get\('name','?'\), a.get\('created_at','?'\), a.get\('results_count','?'\)\) for a in data]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a.get\('tool',{}\).get\('name','?'\), a.get\('ref','?'\), a.get\('created_at','?'\), a.get\('results_count','?'\)\) for a in data]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; alerts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['tool']['name'], a['number']\) for a in alerts]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; alerts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tools=set\(a['tool']['name'] for a in alerts\); print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(tools\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; alerts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(a, indent=2\)\) for a in alerts[:1]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; analyses=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['tool']['name'], a['ref'], a['created_at'][:10]\) for a in analyses]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; analyses=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tools=set\(a['tool']['name'] for a in analyses\); print\('Tools found:', sorted\(tools\)\); brakeman=[a for a in analyses if 'rakeman' in a['tool']['name']]; print\('Brakeman analyses:', len\(brakeman\)\)")
